name: loops
description: Send emails, manage contacts, and trigger events with Loops — the email platform for SaaS.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for Loops API, CLI, LMX email markup, and deliverability.
interface.longDescription: Bundle reusable skills for integrating Loops from application code, using the Loops CLI, authoring LMX email content, and email sending best practices.
defaultPrompt: Add a contact to Loops from my backend.
Send a transactional email with the Loops API.
Write a welcome email in LMX for Loops.
